returns.maxSupply: The max circulating supply allowed for this compliance.

setMaxSupply(uint256).details: Setting the value to zero removes the cap. Reverts if the new cap is below the tracked supply.

params.maxSupply: The new circulating supply cap (0 = uncapped).

getCurrentSupply(address).notice: Returns the current circulating supply tracked by the module for the given compliance instance.

getMaxSupply(address).notice: Returns the configured maximum supply for a given compliance instance.

setMaxSupply(uint256).notice: Owner-only (compliance) mutation to configure the maximum supply.
